a:r.a:t: Note: Captive demand considers current cargo volumes, growth rates, and annual vessel capacity (driven by number of trips / year, cargo capacity, and utilization)
GAO Report on Government Preference Cargo
Legally Mandated Demand from SHIPS Act Provisions
SCF Supported by Legally Mandated Demand (# vessels)
Vessel types Sealift Command needs in a contingency are precisely the ones the bill fails to incentivize.
JM: Generally put the largest segment at the bottom and display segments in descending order
JM: Always include legend if segments are not defined elsewhere
